workflow.name: ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA across existing member nodes with bash command steps.

data.label: Prepare ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA node runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[container-runtime] %s\n' "$*"; }
if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "docker is already installed"
  docker --version
  exit 0
fi
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with apt"
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with dnf"
  dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with yum"
  yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
else
  echo "Unsupported package manager. Install Docker manually." >&2
  exit 1
fi
systemctl enable --now docker
docker version

data.label: Render ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA node configuration
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.6.11 10.0.6.12 10.0.6.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.6.11) NODE_NAME='clickhouse-01'; NODE_ROLE='clickhouse'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.6.12) NODE_NAME='clickhouse-02'; NODE_ROLE='clickhouse'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.6.13) NODE_NAME='clickhouse-03'; NODE_ROLE='clickhouse'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

install -d -m 0750 /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha
install -d -m 0750 /var/lib/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha
cat >/opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/.env <<EOF
CLICKHOUSE_DB=app_db
CLICKHOUSE_USER=app_user
CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=change-me
OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME=$NODE_NAME
OCTASTACK_NODE_ROLE=$NODE_ROLE
OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX=$NODE_INDEX
CURRENT_IP=$CURRENT_IP
FIRST_NODE_IP=10.0.6.11
CLUSTER_PEERS=10.0.6.11,10.0.6.12,10.0.6.13
SEED_IPS=10.0.6.11,10.0.6.12,10.0.6.13

EOF
chmod 0600 /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/.env

cat >/opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/cluster.xml <<EOF
<clickhouse>
  <keeper_server>
    <tcp_port>9181</tcp_port>
    <server_id>${NODE_INDEX}</server_id>
    <log_storage_path>/var/lib/clickhouse/coordination/log</log_storage_path>
    <snapshot_storage_path>/var/lib/clickhouse/coordination/snapshots</snapshot_storage_path>
    <coordination_settings>
      <operation_timeout_ms>10000</operation_timeout_ms>
      <session_timeout_ms>30000</session_timeout_ms>
      <raft_logs_level>warning</raft_logs_level>
    </coordination_settings>
    <raft_configuration>
      <server><id>1</id><hostname>10.0.6.11</hostname><port>9234</port></server>
      <server><id>2</id><hostname>10.0.6.12</hostname><port>9234</port></server>
      <server><id>3</id><hostname>10.0.6.13</hostname><port>9234</port></server>
    </raft_configuration>
  </keeper_server>
  <zookeeper>
    <node><host>10.0.6.11</host><port>9181</port></node>
    <node><host>10.0.6.12</host><port>9181</port></node>
    <node><host>10.0.6.13</host><port>9181</port></node>
  </zookeeper>
  <remote_servers>
    <octastack_cluster>
      <shard><replica><host>10.0.6.11</host><port>9000</port></replica></shard>
      <shard><replica><host>10.0.6.12</host><port>9000</port></replica></shard>
      <shard><replica><host>10.0.6.13</host><port>9000</port></replica></shard>
    </octastack_cluster>
  </remote_servers>
  <macros>
    <cluster>octastack_cluster</cluster>
    <shard>${NODE_INDEX}</shard>
    <replica>${OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME}</replica>
  </macros>
  <listen_host>0.0.0.0</listen_host>
</clickhouse>
EOF

cat >/opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/compose.yml <<'COMPOSE'
services:
  clickhouse:
    image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:24.8
    container_name: octastack-clickhouse
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - .env
    volumes:
      - data:/var/lib/clickhouse
      - /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/cluster.xml:/etc/clickhouse-server/config.d/cluster.xml:ro
volumes:
  data: {}
COMPOSE
log "configuration rendered"

data.label: Deploy ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/compose.yml pull
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/compose.yml up -d
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha/compose.yml ps
      log "node deployment complete"

data.label: Document ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha-topology.md <<'EOF'
# ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA

Members:
- clickhouse-01: 10.0.6.11 (clickhouse)
- clickhouse-02: 10.0.6.12 (clickhouse)
- clickhouse-03: 10.0.6.13 (clickhouse)

Three ClickHouse members run replicated MergeTree-ready cluster configuration with embedded ClickHouse Keeper quorum.
EOF
cat /tmp/clickhouse_replicated_keeper_ha-topology.md

data.label: Validate ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA node
data.command: curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1:8123/ping' && docker exec octastack-clickhouse clickhouse-client --query="SELECT * FROM system.clusters WHERE cluster = 'octastack_cluster'"

data.label: ClickHouse Replicated Keeper HA health check
